title: Metalica
description: A simple mod that adds a variety of metals for use in a modpack
body:
Metalica is a simple mod that adds a variety of metals to the game in several forms:

*   Ingots
*   Nuggets
*   Dusts
*   Raw ores / raw ore blocks
*   Full blocks
*   Ores / deepslate ores

In their present states, these blocks and items don't do much - they're primarily for compatibility and use in modpacks.

The current metals that are added are:

*   Aluminum
*   Lead
*   Zinc

Config will be added SoonTM

REQUIRES [MANTLE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mantle)

Cheers to KnightMiner for help with atlas textures
